_comment: Sample response from GET https://openaffiliate.dev/api/programs?q=AI+video&sort=relevance&limit=5. Use for offline development and testing. Field names match the live openaffiliate.dev API exactly. No API key or auth required — the API is fully public.

programs.name: HeyGen
programs.description: AI video generation platform. Create studio-quality videos with AI avatars, voice cloning, and video translation in 175+ languages.
programs.shortDescription: AI avatars + voice cloning for video creation
programs.agentPrompt: HeyGen lets marketers create professional AI avatar videos without cameras or studios. Best for: demo videos, course content, multilingual marketing.

programs.name: Synthesia
programs.description: AI video creation platform for enterprise. Create professional training videos, marketing content, and presentations with AI avatars.
programs.agentPrompt: Synthesia targets enterprise L&D teams. Best for: compliance training, onboarding videos, internal comms at scale.

programs.name: Descript
programs.description: All-in-one AI video and podcast editor. Edit video by editing text, AI voice cloning, screen recording, and transcription.
programs.shortDescription: Edit video like a doc — AI-powered
programs.agentPrompt: Descript appeals to podcasters and YouTubers who want fast text-based editing. Lifetime recurring commission makes it a strong long-term earner.

programs.name: InVideo AI
programs.description: AI-powered video creation from text prompts. Turn any idea into a publish-ready video with AI script, stock footage, and voiceover.
programs.agentPrompt: InVideo AI targets social media creators and small businesses. 120-day cookie is one of the longest in the AI video category.

programs.name: Pictory
programs.description: AI video summarization and creation. Turn blog posts and long-form content into short branded videos with automatic captions.
programs.shortDescription: Repurpose blog posts into short videos automatically
programs.agentPrompt: Pictory is ideal for bloggers and content teams repurposing written content into video. Positions well in SEO-focused content strategies.
